title: Verify user can be converted to a subscriber via the discount offer during cancellation flow
description: Tests the flow where a user's cancellation intent is successfully converted into a paid subscription by accepting the 'First Month Discount' offer.
preconditions: User is in an active trial and belongs to the target cohort.
The discount offer is enabled in the backend.

steps.description: 3. On the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, click 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'.
4. On the 'Incentive' offer pop-up, click the primary action to accept the offer.
5. Complete the payment for the discounted amount.

expected_result: Payment is successful. The user's account is scheduled to convert to a paid subscription after the trial ends. The trial remains active until its original end date.
